entities.name: V
entities.context: Vrijen Attawar, subject of the knowledge system — career coach, entrepreneur, founder of Careerspan

entities.name: Collaborative Positioning
entities.context: Communication approach framing interactions as 'let's do X together' rather than transactional requests

entities.name: Low-Pressure Language
entities.context: Communication style using phrases like 'when convenient', 'whenever makes sense' to reduce urgency

entities.name: Warm Closing
entities.context: Email closing pattern with optional appreciation + 'Best,' — e.g., 'Looking forward to collaborating!'

entities.name: Voice Fidelity
entities.context: Quality scoring rubric (40 points) measuring how well writing matches V's authentic voice

entities.name: Email System
entities.context: System that handles email signatures automatically

entities.name: Finalization
entities.context: Phase 4 of a process involving Quality Check + Save, targeting ≥90/100 score

relationships.context: V's outreach methodology positions interactions as collaborative partnerships

V's email signature pattern includes warm closings before automated signature
